title: Waiver of standards
doc_html:
§314.  Waiver of standards

The commission shall have authority to waive the application of any uniform safety standard to any facility where the application of the standard would affect continuity of any gas services to the public.

Added by Acts 1968, No. 81, §1.

§314.  Waiver of standards
